section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports pain in the left hand.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom and belongs in the history, not in objective findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's pain is in the left hand.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This restates the location of a patient-reported symptom and is part of the HPI rather than an exam or test finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's levels of everything will be repeated.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a future action (ordering repeat labs), which is part of the management plan, not a current exam or test result.
